caption: A man with distinctive grey and yellow hair, wearing glasses, a white button-down shirt, a red bow tie, and yellow suspenders, is seated in a studio. He wears black over-ear headphones and speaks into a professional black microphone positioned in front of him. In the background, a white wall features a framed yellow logo, and a blurred storefront window displays the text "UNIQUE FASHIONS". The red and white on-screen logos "TALK PODCAST" and "TALK 101" are visible on the left and right sides of the scene. Throughout the sequence, the man remains in the same position, slightly shifting his head and changing his facial expressions as he talks, while the camera and surroundings remain static.
